name: Baked Ham Glazes
recipeInstructions:
Orange-honey- combine 1/2 cup honey with 1/2 cup orange juice and 1 cup light brown sugar. Mix well.
Currant Jell- blend together 1 cup currant jelly, 1/2 teaspoon dry mustard and 2 tablespoons prepared horse radish.
Cranberry-fork whip 1 cup cranberry jelly with 1/2 cup light corn syrup.
Mustard-combine 1 cup light brown sugar, 1/4 cup prepared yellow mustard and 1/2 teaspoon powdered cloves.
